summary: M4.5 (Execution modes and non-interference): Created docs/EXECUTION_MODES.md documenting interactive collaboration (default) vs containerized unattended (opt-in) modes, settings layering strategy (project -> local -> CLI), environment variables, override guidance, and non-interference principle. Pre-existing .claude/settings.json already provided conservative defaults; wrapper scripts already used --permission-mode bypassPermissions only when explicitly invoked. Registered EXECUTION_MODES doc in manifest and default profile. Code-reviewer approved.
changes: Updated capabilities/project-capabilities.yaml (added EXECUTION_MODES doc entry and default profile include)
reviewer_notes: Non-blocking: partial duplication of execution mode prose across META_SPEC.md, EXECUTION_MODES.md, and CLAUDE.md
Non-blocking: environment variable table omits PROMPT_FILE positional arg
Non-blocking: run-phase.sh git add -A could stage unintended files (pre-existing, out of M4.5 scope)
suggested_commit_message: meta-M4.5: document execution modes and non-interference principle
